raw_model_answer:
STEP 1: Rinse mouth with water immediately.
STEP 2: Drink 1-2 glasses of water.
STEP 3: Call poison control or emergency services.
DO NOT: Induce vomiting unless told to do so by a medical professional.
ESCALATE: Seek immediate medical attention; bring the product container or label.

immediate_steps: Call poison control or emergency services.
do_not_do: Induce vomiting unless told to do so by a medical professional.
escalate_when: Seek immediate medical attention; bring the product container or label.
